content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Updated compiled backend defaults so workflow implementers now resolve to Codex `gpt-5.4-high`, final-review panels now default to `codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh` plus `claude/claude-opus-4-6`, and direct role-based fallback paths/tests were aligned so workspace and project overrides still flow through the existing resolution stack.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect backend policy/config resolution to find the compiled implementer and final-review defaults, plus tests and conformance scenarios that assumed the old Opus implementer default.
2. [Completed] Patch the effective config defaults and hardcoded direct-role fallback so implementers default to Codex `gpt-5.4-high` and final-review reviewers default to Codex `gpt-5.4-xhigh` plus Claude Opus 4.6, while preserving explicit workspace/project/CLI override behavior.
3. [Completed] Update affected tests and drift scenarios, then run the required validation commands.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo test` passed.
- `cargo clippy` passed (with existing warnings in unrelated code, including `src/adapters/fs.rs:1122`).
- `cargo fmt --check` passed.
- Added/updated tests now assert the compiled implementer default is `codex/gpt-5.4-high` and the compiled final-review panel defaults are `codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh` plus `claude/claude-opus-4-6`.

## Outstanding Risks

- The worktree still contains pre-existing unrelated modifications in `.beads/issues.jsonl` and `.ralph-burning/projects/utm/*`, which I left untouched.
